## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests / CI

## How I tested

Describe the manual and/or automated testing. For UI changes, attach a screenshot
(light **and** dark if relevant).

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `project.yml`, not the generated `.xcodeproj`
- [ ] New user-facing strings are localized (EN + RU) in `Localizable.xcstrings`
- [ ] Colors/fonts/spacing use the design system (no hardcoded values)
- [ ] Unimplemented features are marked `Coming soon`, not faked
- [ ] `xcodegen generate` → build succeeds; tests pass (`⌘U`)
